title: Add explicit RepoBrief snapshot create command
goal: Implement or close explicit repobrief snapshot create as the sole early snapshot-writing path

acceptance.assertion: The slice is implemented or explicitly closed against current main/PR state with no hidden broadening.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: RepoBrief boundaries are preserved: no hidden refresh, no Git mutation in RepoBrief core, no review/runtime correctness claim.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Relevant tests/checks are run, or a precise blocker/gap is recorded.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: The output states what the evidence does not establish.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.outcome: Explicit RepoBrief snapshot create is present on Lenskit origin/main and verified; no Lenskit patch was required.

checks: runtime smoke: repobrief snapshot create on temporary git repo -> rc 0, bundle manifest exists, git status preserved, mutation_boundary writes only brief_bundle_artifacts
acceptance_summary: explicit repobrief snapshot create command exists
profile is recorded in emitted result and manifest capabilities
no Git, PR, patch, or source working tree mutation observed in smoke
